name: Gulf-Style Creole Fish
recipeIngredient: Turbot or other white fish (1 lb)
recipeInstructions:
1. Melt butter in a large skillet over medium heat; add green bell pepper and onion and cook for 6 to 8 minutes or until tender, stirring occasionally.
2. Add the fish and cook for 5 minutes or until opaque, stirring occasionally.
3. Stir in stewed tomatoes, tomato paste, sliced mushrooms, and Creole seasoning blend.
4. Bring to a boil, reduce heat and simmer for 10 to 15 minutes or until slightly thickened.
5. Stir in minced clams and cook, uncovered, for 2 minutes until thoroughly heated, stirring occasionally.
6. Serve with hot cooked rice and garnish with lemon wedges.
